scene_description: A collection of packaged food items, mostly replicas, sits inside and around an open cardboard box placed on a gray couch.

candidates.rationale: The top flaps of the cardboard box are unfolded, clearly revealing the items stored inside.
The lid of the peach can has been completely removed, indicating it is opened rather than sealed.

scene_description: A collection of toy grocery items, including cans, boxes, and bottles, is displayed on a gray upholstered chair.

candidates.rationale: The metal lid is firmly attached to the top rim of the can, indicating it is sealed and intact.
The yellow squeeze cap is clearly visible and closed on top of the bottle, meaning it is not opened.

scene_description: A pile of colorful toy food containers, including cans, boxes, and bottles, is scattered on a dark table.

candidates.rationale: A gray lid is visibly placed and secured on top of the blue and red can.
The orange cardboard box is fully closed and shows no signs of being torn or opened.

scene_description: A collection of packaged and canned groceries is scattered on a dark surface in front of a window with blinds.

candidates.rationale: The metal lid has been completely removed from the top edge of the can, exposing the contents.
The cardboard box is visually intact, square, and shows no signs of crushing or tearing.

scene_description: A collection of miniature grocery items, including boxes, cans, and bottles, is displayed on a dark surface.

candidates.rationale: The top spout/flap of the milk carton is visibly unfolded and separated, indicating it is open.
The cardboard box containing cookies appears completely closed and sealed along the top edge.

scene_description: A collection of miniature grocery items is displayed on a black shelf, with some items placed inside a partially opened drawer.

candidates.rationale: The drawer is clearly pulled out from the shelf, exposing the items inside.
A significant portion of the spaghetti box extends past the front edge of the partially opened drawer.

scene_description: A collection of toy food boxes, cans, and bottles are contained within a cardboard box.

candidates.rationale: The top flap of the milk carton is visibly unfolded and peeled back, revealing the interior structure and the 'OPEN' marking.
The flaps on the top of the macaroni and cheese box are fully closed and sealed.

scene_description: A collection of miniature grocery items, including boxes, cans, and bottles, is displayed on a gray textured surface.

candidates.target_object: large Macaroni and Cheese box (top left)
candidates.rationale: The cardboard box is fully intact and sealed, showing no visible signs of being opened.
The blue plastic cap is clearly visible and secured on top of the bottle.

scene_description: A collection of miniature toy grocery items, including boxes, cans, and bottles, is placed inside and around a white plastic bag on a gray couch.

candidates.rationale: The top lid of the silver can is visibly missing, revealing the interior.
The cardboard box appears sealed and intact, showing no signs of having been opened.

scene_description: A kitchen scene showing an open refrigerator and open upper cabinets filled with various food items.

candidates.rationale: The refrigerator door is visibly swung out from the main body of the appliance.
The banana resting on the lowest shelf inside the refrigerator is fully encased in its peel.

scene_description: A kitchen counter features an open oven below an open microwave, and a partially opened dishwasher is visible on the right.

candidates.rationale: The oven door is visibly hinged down and open, exposing the interior cavity.
The microwave door is visibly swung open, showing the interior and the fruit inside.

scene_description: A collection of toy food cans and an orange juice carton are resting on a black table.

candidates.rationale: The cardboard container shows no visible signs of damage, dents, or crushing.
The can is lying horizontally on its side, rather than standing vertically on an end.

scene_description: A kitchen counter displays packaged food items next to an open dishwasher containing dishes.

candidates.rationale: The dishwasher door is clearly pulled down, exposing the racks inside.
The top of the milk carton appears to have been opened and manipulated, indicating it is no longer factory sealed.

scene_description: A kitchen counter and sink area are visible beneath open upper cabinets filled with various food products.

candidates.rationale: The door is clearly swung outward on its hinges, exposing the contents of the shelf.
The can's lid is fully intact and shows no visual indication of being lifted or punctured.

scene_description: Various packaged food items, cans, boxes, and a mug are displayed on a red cloth on a table.

candidates.rationale: The can lid is intact and sealed, showing it has not been opened.
The interior of the mug is clearly visible and contains no contents.

scene_description: A view of a kitchen counter featuring a sink, various food items, a coffee machine, and an open upper cabinet.

candidates.rationale: The cabinet door is visibly swung open, revealing the contents of the cabinet.
The dishwasher door is lowered and open, exposing the interior racks and dishes.

scene_description: A kitchen scene showing a built-in microwave oven with its door open and a dishwasher rack pulled out.

candidates.rationale: The door of the microwave oven is visibly swung outward, granting access to the interior.
The window blinds are partially lowered, covering a significant portion of the window.

scene_description: A kitchen counter holds various packaged foods next to an open refrigerator and an open utensil drawer.

candidates.rationale: The refrigerator door is clearly swung wide open, revealing the interior shelves.
The drawer below the counter is pulled out, exposing the utensils inside.
